name.label: Tool name
name.description: The tool id clients call; use letters, numbers, dashes, or underscores.

server.label: Server
server.description: The MCP server this tool is exposed on.

description.label: Description
description.description: Explains what the tool does; the client's model reads this to decide when to call it.

params.label: Parameters
params.description: The tool's inputs, one row per parameter.

timeoutSeconds.label: Timeout (seconds)
timeoutSeconds.description: Maximum seconds to wait for an MCP tool out before returning a timeout error to the client.

readOnly.label: Read-only
readOnly.description: Marks the tool side-effect-free, a hint clients may use to batch calls.

errorPort.label: Error port
errorPort.description: Adds an error output port; when the node throws, the error is sent there instead of halting the flow.

completePort.label: Complete port
completePort.description: Adds a complete output port that emits after the node finishes handling a message.

statusPort.label: Status port
statusPort.description: Adds a status output port that emits the node's status changes as messages.

call.label: Call
call.description: Fires when a client calls this tool — carries the tool arguments under payload. Wire the flow's answer back to an MCP tool out node.
